topic: My blanket is pulled to the floor every night, though I sleep without moving.
title: Something Pulls My Blanket | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: Every morning my blanket lay pooled on the floor.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a blanket crumpled on bedroom floorboards beside a bed, pale morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I rent the top room of an old narrow house.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a small attic bedroom with sloped ceiling, single bed, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I sleep flat and still. I barely move.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a neatly tucked bed with a folded blanket, soft shadow, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The first time, I blamed a bad and restless dream.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of twisted bedsheets half off a mattress at dawn, dim room, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: But the blanket lay folded, not thrown, on the floor.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a neatly folded blanket resting on floorboards at the foot of a bed, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Folded the way I was never taught to fold.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a precisely folded blanket square on a dark floor, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I tucked it tight and pinned the corners down.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of bed corners tucked firmly under a mattress, hands smoothing the fabric, dim lamp, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: By dawn the pins lay stacked, the blanket folded again.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of small safety pins stacked in a neat pile on bare floorboards, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then I felt the slow tug while still half awake.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a blanket edge sliding off the foot of a bed in darkness, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Something wanted me uncovered. I never learned why.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of an exposed empty bed with no blanket, sheets pulled tight, cold moonlight, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I sleep in a zipped bag on the same bed now.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a sleeping bag laid across a bare mattress, dim attic room, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Each morning the zip is open, and I am cold.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of an unzipped sleeping bag splayed open on a bed at dawn, pale light, vertical 9:16 framing
